title: Add 10L 4K long-context negative-result submission
body:
## Summary
- add a non-record / negative-result submission for a 10-layer 4K-context run
- document that the run only covered about 4.01B training tokens within the 10-minute budget
- include README, submission metadata, train log excerpt, and the run script

## Notes
This PR is intentionally framed as a negative result rather than a competitive record.

This was effectively a one-shot practice submission under tight credit constraints, so I was only able to run a single 8xH100 attempt.

The main takeaway is that the 4K setup reduced training coverage too much under the 10-minute budget, leading to substantially worse `val_bpb` than the public baselines.

Selected reported score in `submission.json`:
- post-quant TTT `val_bpb = 1.8389`

Also included for reference in the README and log:
- post-quant sliding `val_bpb = 2.50893917`
